What We Offer

World-Class Drone Services

Precision agriculture solutions tailored for Pakistan's diverse crops. Pricing adapts to your field size, crop type, and location.

Most Popular
💧

Precision Spraying

AI-guided drone spraying reduces pesticide/fertilizer waste by up to 30%. Uniform coverage even on complex field shapes. Works for wheat, cotton, rice, sugarcane & more.

Starting from (per acre) ₨ 800 — 1,500
🗺️

Crop Health Mapping

NDVI and thermal imaging to detect disease, drought stress, and nutrient deficiencies before they become visible. Full field report with actionable recommendations.

Full field analysis (per acre) ₨ 1,200 — 2,500
📐

Land Survey & Mapping

High-resolution aerial mapping for accurate land area measurement, field boundary documentation, and 3D terrain models for irrigation planning.

Per survey project ₨ 5,000 — 15,000
🌾

Variable Rate Application

VRA technology applies more fertilizer where the crop needs it, less where it doesn't. Prescription maps from NDVI data drive every spray decision.

Prescription map included ₨ 1,500 — 3,000
📊

Agri Consultation

Expert analysis of your drone data with actionable recommendations. Our CS-qualified team translates complex satellite and drone data into simple farming decisions.

Per consultation session ₨ 2,000 — 5,000
📸

Before/After Documentation

High-resolution photography and video of your fields before and after treatment. Shareable reports proving real results to farm managers and agricultural banks.

Full documentation package ₨ 3,500 — 8,000

Our Story

Built from the Soil Up

At Agri Vibe 360, we believe Pakistan's prosperity lies at the intersection of the soil and the sky. We empower our farmers with world-class precision agriculture technology — accessible, understandable, and affordable.

💧

Precision Spraying

Reducing chemical usage by up to 30% while ensuring uniform coverage across every acre.

🔬

Early Health Detection

Identifying crop stress before it's visible to the naked eye using NDVI and thermal imaging.

📈

Actionable Data

Translating complex aerial imagery into simple, profit-boosting advice for every acre.

🌐

Bilingual Accessibility

Full English & Urdu support ensuring no farmer in Punjab is left behind by technology.

Triple Threat Expert 🏆

Our Work

Real Results from Real Punjab Fields

Data-driven proof of Agri Vibe 360's impact. Every card shows real numbers from actual operations.

Sahiwal · Wheat
+18%
Yield Gain
🌾

Wheat Precision Spray — 45 Acres

Dual-pass NDVI mapping followed by variable-rate fungicide application in Sahiwal district. Eliminated manual spraying crew of 8 workers.

🌿 28% pesticide saved ⏱️ 4 hrs vs 2 days 💰 ₨ 12,400 saved
Kassowal · Cotton
-35%
Pest Loss
🪡

Cotton Early Pest Detection — 80 Acres

Thermal imaging flight detected bollworm infestation in 2 field zones 12 days before visible damage. Targeted treatment saved the majority of the crop.

🔍 Early detection 💊 Targeted treatment 💰 ₨ 45,000 saved
Punjab · Rice
98%
Coverage
🌿

Rice Field Survey & Spray — 120 Acres

Complete land survey, NDVI health mapping, and precision herbicide application across multiple rice paddies. GPS boundary maps delivered to farm owner.

📐 GPS boundaries 🗺️ 3D terrain map ⏱️ 6 hrs total
